Off Calendar Jul-10-2012 Granted Per Written Order

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (3025-3027 Harrison Street, San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar Jun-20-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nancy Rasch for Debra Dolch.

The sale was confirmed at $640,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). An additional bond in the amount of $208,000.00 is required.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Andrade.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (3025-3027 Harrison Street, San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar Jun-13-2012 Continued To Jun-20-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nancy Rasch for Debra Dolch (Administrator).

Counsel requested for one week continuance to publish notice. Ex Parte Request to shorten publish notice to five days was filed yesterday. The Court granted the request to shorten notice to five days (order for the same signed in open court). Report of Sale and Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property was continued to June 20, 2012 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (2319 Alemany Blvd. S.F.)
Off Calendar May-16-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nancy Rasch for Debra Dolch.

The sale was confirmed at $510,000.00 subject to the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order). An additional bond in the amount of $435,000.00 is required.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Dec-05-2011 Granted Per Written Order
